system.Text:
__When you travel over hazardous or unknown lands, or or sail an unfamilar route through perilous seas__, give the expedition a name and rank. Then, for each segment of the expedition, envision your approach. If you...

  * Move at speed: Roll +edge
  * Keep a low profile: Roll +shadow
  * Stay vigilant: Roll +wits

If you set off well-prepared from a friendly community, add +1 to your initial roll.

On a __strong hit__, you reach a waypoint. Envision the location. Then choose one.

  * You make good use of your resources: Mark progress.
  * You make good pace: Mark progress and take +2 momentum, but also @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1). 

On a __weak hit__, you reach a waypoint, incurring costs en route. Mark progress and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

On a __miss__, you are waylaid by a crisis, or arrive at a waypoint to confront an immediate hardship or threat. Do not mark progress, and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you travel over hazardous or unknown lands, or or sail an unfamilar route through perilous seas...

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, you reach a waypoint. Envision the location. Then choose one.

  * You make good use of your resources: Mark progress.
  * You make good pace: Mark progress and take +2 momentum, but also @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, you reach a waypoint, incurring costs en route. Mark progress and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, you are waylaid by a crisis, or arrive at a waypoint to confront an immediate hardship or threat. Do not mark progress, and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
